LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: NO APPEARANCE. THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING WHICH WAS NOT CONTESTED. PETITIONERS CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, AND CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT ALSO AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS' FEES OF $1,387.50 AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $540, FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $59,723.39. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Michael Borstein, Esq. of Weinberg Roger Rosenfeld, Tel. 510.337.1000, for petitioner and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: No appearance. The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. PETITIONERS CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, and CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration is granted. No opposition filed. The Court also awards reasonable attorneys' fees of $1,387.50 and costs in the amount of $540, for a total amount of $59,723.39. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award And Index Of Federal Authorities
